Grounded in the programme pillars of Education, Enrichment and Excursions, and guided by our cultural pillars of Encourage, Empower and Elevate, Young Hearts addresses intergenerational vulnerabilities and socio-educational disparities with a strong emphasis on socio-emotional development and mental well-being. Through creating safe, nurturing and engaging spaces, we support children and youth to grow in confidence, resilience, empathy and purpose, enabling them to be positive contributors in their homes, schools and communities, one young heart at a time. JOB PURPOSE AND RESPONSIBILITIES The Youth Worker plays a key role in strengthening the quality and intentionality of youth engagement across the Young Hearts programme.
